title: Kuroobi Falls
description: On pages 5–8, kuroobi falls focuses on Sanji, Kuroobi, Zoro, Hatchan as sanji, Zoro, and Usopp begin turning the battle around while Luffy’s rescue becomes the key to victory.
scene: On pages 5–8, kuroobi falls focuses on Sanji, Kuroobi, Zoro, Hatchan as sanji, Zoro, and Usopp begin turning the battle around while Luffy’s rescue becomes the key to victory.

dialogue.speaker: Nojiko
dialogue.text: What... What did that shark guy just do?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I don't know... I thought he only threw some water,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But it knocked those two down and had them coughing up blood!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What Happened to Brother Luffy!? Don't Tell Me He's Dead?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I don't even need to touch you pathetic humans.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Just a little water's more than enough to kill the likes of you... this is the difference in power between our races.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: (Damn it... Fighting us is just a game to him... he's only splashing some water on us but...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It feels as strong as a shotgun blast... is this, how powerful a shark type fishman is?! Even for a fishman...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He's on a completely different level!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's not as if your lives are actually worth anything...

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
